#01
single_image retro typographic posteraudience calloutlimited editioncollab aestheticstill life with real fruit

Visual summary

Pink retro typographic card with a bold red audience-callout headline, surrounded by real strawberries on a soft cream surface.

Copy verbatim

HeadlineWE ARE LOOKING FOR GIRLIES THAT FEEL PUFFY FOR NO REASON,
Primary textDaily nutrition, but make it a treat. Your favorite greens gummy meets your favorite prebiotic soda. Limited edition.
CTAShop Now

Color palette

Typography

Mixed retro magazine vibe with a bold condensed all-caps sans headline and slim italic accents.

Composition

Center typographic card on a flat bed of real strawberries against a soft pink cream background.

Focal point

The all-caps red audience-callout headline.

Mood

playful, indulgent, identification-driven

NotesLimited-edition flavor collab, not evergreen. Library ID not visible in crop.
Generation promptsfor Aonic Fuel
Concept breakdown

An audience-identification ad. The headline names a specific symptom-buyer and the retro magazine treatment makes the ad feel peer-recommended rather than brand-led.

Adaptation notes

For Aonic Fuel we drop the collab framing and use the same magazine-poster format to call out the Premier-Protein Refugee avatar. Rotate the angle across three variants so the user can pick the wedge that fits their week's media plan.

Recreate 1Real cocoa flavorminimum change, keep visual & copy where possible
Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel Rich Chocolate. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image. Match Aonic Fuel's brand identity (colors and typography).Set the headline to FOR THE LABEL READERS WHO ASKED FOR REAL COCOA, and the body to Aonic Fuel Rich Chocolate. Real cocoa. No natural flavor stand ins. Place a small 30 percent off your first order chip near the CTA. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.
Recreate 25g fiber and satietyminimum change, keep visual & copy where possible
Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image. Apply Aonic Fuel's brand identity. Set the headline to FOR THE GIRLIES WHO WANT A SHAKE THAT ACTUALLY KEEPS THEM FULL, and the body to 32g of complete protein and 5g of fiber to support satiety and digestive wellness. Add a small Get 30 percent off today badge near the CTA. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.
Recreate 3Senada Greca credibilityminimum change, keep visual & copy where possible
Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel. Use the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image. Switch the brand identity to Aonic Fuel. Set the headline to FOR THE WOMEN ALREADY DRINKING THE SHAKE SENADA DRINKS, and the body to Co founded by Senada Greca. 32g complete protein. Zero artificial sweeteners. Include a small First case 30 percent off chip near the CTA. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.
Reimagineconcept reworked through customer's foundational docs
Generate a social media ad for Aonic Fuel. Use the attached example ad as a layout and composition reference, but build the scene fully for Aonic Fuel. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image. Compose a retro magazine typographic card in warm cream and deep cocoa brown, surrounded by photographed raw cocoa beans and a single sprig of mint for tactile contrast. Headline in bold condensed all caps cocoa brown sans: WE ARE LOOKING FOR THE LABEL READERS WHO ALREADY QUIT PREMIER ONCE. Smaller italic body below: You read the back of the bottle. You felt the sucralose aftertaste linger. You are not crazy, and you are not the only one. Handwritten subline: Built by Dr. Jason Mitchell, N.D., who refused to use artificial sweeteners. Bottom center, Aonic logo with a small badge reading No pixie dusting. Bottom right CTA chip: Drink Real Instead. A small cocoa chip in the lower left reads Get 30 percent off today. Match Aonic Fuel's brand identity (colors and typography). Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English. Mood: premium, knowing, validation driven.

single_image high saturation color blockoutrage headlineproduct heroirreverent voicefront of pack led

Visual summary

High saturation yellow background with a bold expletive headline top-left and the product pouch centered above a row of cartoon gummy bears.

Copy verbatim

HeadlineF*CK YOU, HAIR LOSS
Primary textSupport brain power and beauty with biotin and 20+ vitamins and minerals.
CTAShop Now

Color palette

Typography

Bold slab serif or heavy condensed sans all caps headline, smaller sans body below.

Composition

Full bleed saturated background, headline top left, body claims under it, product centered, mascot row footer.

Focal point

The expletive headline that interrupts the scroll before the product registers.

Mood

irreverent, attention grabbing, confident

NotesLibrary ID not visible in crop. Hair-loss positioning is competitor-specific.
Generation promptsfor Aonic Fuel
Concept breakdown

Pattern-interrupt outrage headline directed at a problem the customer hates, paired with a saturated color block and a product hero.

Adaptation notes

Aonic Fuel's parallel outrage targets are sucralose and ultra processed shakes. Each variant directs the same expletive structure at a different enemy that aligns with one of Aonic Fuel's proof points.

Recreate 1Anti-sucralose wedgeminimum change, keep visual & copy where possible
Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image. Match Aonic Fuel's brand identity (colors and typography).Set the headline to F*CK YOU, SUCRALOSE. Body under the headline: 32g complete protein. Real cocoa. Zero artificial sweeteners. No pixie dusting. Place a small Get 30 percent off today chip near the CTA. No disclaimer needed. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.
Recreate 232g complete proteinminimum change, keep visual & copy where possible
Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel. Use the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image. Apply Aonic Fuel's brand identity. Set the headline to F*CK YOU, 20G SHAKES. Body: 32g of complete protein from lactose free milk protein isolate. 5 calories per gram of protein. Add a small First case 30 percent off badge near the bottom. No disclaimer needed. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.
Recreate 3Dr. Mitchell medical credibilityminimum change, keep visual & copy where possible
Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image. Switch the brand identity to Aonic Fuel. Set the headline to F*CK YOU, FAKE HEALTH. Body: Co formulated by Dr. Jason Mitchell, N.D. 32g protein. Real cocoa. Zero artificial sweeteners. Include a small 30 percent off your first order chip near the CTA. No disclaimer needed. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.
Reimagineconcept reworked through customer's foundational docs
Generate a social media ad for Aonic Fuel. Use the attached example ad as a layout and composition reference, but build the scene fully for Aonic Fuel. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image, centered on a clean Aonic palette background. Bold heavy all caps slab headline top left in cream or warm cocoa brown: F*CK YOU, SUCRALOSE. Body directly underneath in tight sans serif: 32g complete protein. Real cocoa. Lactose free milk protein isolate. Zero artificial sweeteners. Built by Dr. Jason Mitchell, N.D., who refused to use them. Replace any mascot footer with a single horizontal line of small black text: The protein shake category got hijacked by sucralose. We refuse to use it. Aonic logo in the bottom right corner. Small cocoa brown chip in the lower left: Get 30 percent off today. Match Aonic Fuel's brand identity (colors and typography). No disclaimer needed. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English. Mood: blunt, irreverent, confidently anti establishment.

single_image 2 panel memecartoon illustrationbefore and afterirreverent voicetiktok aesthetic

Visual summary

Two-panel cartoon meme on a soft pink background, contrasting a slumped stylized character on the left with a glowing version on the right holding the product.

Copy verbatim

HeadlineHot girl tummy issues? Yeah, same.
Primary text6g fiber, prebiotics, 21 vitamins and minerals, zero sugar.
CTAShop Now

Color palette

Typography

Tight all caps sans for panel captions, casual friendly body text.

Composition

Two equal vertical panels with caption above and character below, soft pink background unifying both panels.

Focal point

The contrast between the slumped left character and the glowing right character holding the product.

Mood

playful, irreverent, peer to peer

NotesVisually a 2 panel meme, classed as single_image in the manifest.
Generation promptsfor Aonic Fuel
Concept breakdown

Before and after cartoon meme that mimics how the avatar already talks about themselves online. Conversion lever is self recognition rather than feature listing.

Adaptation notes

Aonic Fuel's parallel is the contrast between drinking a shake with sucralose or filler and drinking real cocoa with 32g of protein. Rotate three angles for variety.

Add a small 30 percent off your first order chip in the lower right. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.

Right panel: the same woman, standing tall and glowing, holding the Aonic Fuel can up like a trophy, caption above reading ME AFTER REAL COCOA AND 32G OF COMPLETE PROTEIN. Visual summary

Composite green-on-green ad with a large discount percentage center, a hand holding the product, and a vertical claim card on the right.

Copy verbatim

HeadlineFeeling backed up? Get up to 52% off on your first order.
Primary textFeeling off in your gut lately? Daily fiber, prebiotics, and vitamins to keep your gut balanced without powders or prep.
CTAShop Now

Color palette

Typography

Bold condensed sans for the discount and headline, lighter sans for body claims.

Composition

Three panel composite with question hook top, oversized discount centerpiece middle, vertical claim card right.

Focal point

The oversized discount percentage anchoring the center.

Mood

promotional, urgent, value driven

NotesAonic Fuel positioning has its own promo mechanic (30 percent off first order) which replaces the heavier discount centerpiece here.
Generation promptsfor Aonic Fuel
Concept breakdown

Promo heavy direct response ad with a discount as the visual centerpiece and gut framing as the wedge.

Adaptation notes

Aonic Fuel can keep the composite card structure but lead the centerpiece with Aonic's own macro proof points and the active 30 percent first order promo.

single_image before and aftercartoon illustrationGLP-1 framingaudience calloutvector aesthetic

Visual summary

Two-panel cartoon illustration contrasting a sapped left character with a glowing right character holding the product, on a cream pastel background.

Copy verbatim

HeadlineMe on a GLP-1 feeling weak vs. me on a GLP-1 with nutrients that support my muscle function and energy
Primary text21 vitamins and minerals, 6g fiber, zero sugar to support energy and wellness daily.
CTAShop Now

Color palette

Typography

Tight all caps sans for panel captions in a meme style.

Composition

Two equal panels with caption above and character below, cream background bridging the divide.

Focal point

The right panel character glowing and toned, anchored by the product she holds.

Mood

aspirational, peer to peer, knowingly playful

NotesAonic Fuel compliance red line: never name GLP-1, Wegovy, Ozempic, Mounjaro, or Zepbound. Use for people changing how they eat or equivalent.
Generation promptsfor Aonic Fuel
Concept breakdown

Two panel before and after using the avatar fear of muscle loss while on a medication. The cartoon style keeps it relatable rather than medical.

Adaptation notes

Aonic Fuel's Avatar 3 GLP-1 Muscle Protector lands here perfectly. Three angles let the user pick whichever proof point lands hardest in the moment.

Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image, held by the right panel character. Apply Aonic Fuel's brand identity. Add a small 30 percent off your first order chip near the bottom. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.
Recreate 2Dr. Mitchell medical credibilityminimum change, keep visual & copy where possible
Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel. Use the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image in the right panel. Switch the brand identity to Aonic Fuel. Set the left panel caption to EATING LESS, LOSING MUSCLE. Set the right panel caption to BUILT BY DR. JASON MITCHELL, N.D., FOR PEOPLE CHANGING HOW THEY EAT. Avoid medication names. Include a small First case 30 percent off badge near the CTA. Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.

Recreate the attached competitor ad for Aonic Fuel. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image, held by the right panel character. Apply Aonic Fuel's brand identity. Set the left panel caption to WHEN EVEN ONE SIP MAKES ME NAUSEATED. Set the right panel caption to LACTOSE FREE MPI, SIPPABLE OVER 30 MINUTES. Do not name any medication. Generate a social media ad for Aonic Fuel. Use the attached example ad as a layout and composition reference, but build the scene fully for Aonic Fuel. Show the Aonic Fuel can from the attached product image, held by the right panel character. Two equal width cartoon panels on a warm cream background. Left panel: a 50 something woman in soft loungewear, mildly drawn looking, seated at a kitchen counter with an untouched plate of solid food, caption above her reading WHEN EATING LESS MEANS EATING LESS PROTEIN. Right panel: the same woman, standing in athletic wear, visibly stronger, sipping the Aonic Fuel can slowly, caption above reading 32G OF COMPLETE PROTEIN. SIPPABLE OVER 30 MINUTES. NO NAUSEA. Small handwritten line under the right panel: Built by Dr. Jason Mitchell, N.D., for people changing how they eat. Aonic logo bottom center. single_image hero producttestimonial overlayvintage postermascot aesthetic

Visual summary

Vertical hero with an oversized mascot on a soft sky background, a customer testimonial overlay card, and a footer claim band.

Copy verbatim

HeadlineHello, daily poops (finally)
Primary textDaily fiber, prebiotics, and vitamins to keep your gut balanced without powders or prep.
CTAShop Now

Color palette

Typography

Vintage poster condensed sans headline, slim serif testimonial body.

Composition

Vertical layout with headline top left, testimonial card mid left, oversized mascot right anchored, claim band footer.

Focal point

The oversized mascot doing visual identity work.

Mood

irreverent, testimonial driven

NotesGut and poop positioning does not transfer to Aonic Fuel. Reposition around the first sip of real cocoa.
Generation promptsfor Aonic Fuel
Concept breakdown

Mascot hero with testimonial overlay. The mascot is the visual identity anchor and the customer quote does the proof work.

Adaptation notes

Aonic Fuel has no mascot; the can is the hero. The finally a clean shake angle transfers cleanly with three different proof angles.

Add the Aonic logo (just Aonic, not Aonic FUEL) from the reference image somewhere suitable. All overlay text in English.

Soft sage background, oversized mascot anchored right, vertical claim pills stacked center left, yellow star rating footer.

Primary text20+ vitamins, minerals, 6g fiber, sugar free for energy and gut health.

Typography

Friendly rounded sans for the headline, pill shaped claim labels with white sans inside.

approachable, checklist friendly

Checklist claim hero with a mascot anchor. Conversion lever is scannable feature density, not narrative.

Aonic Fuel's per can claim stack maps cleanly to this layout. Rotate angles so the claim stacks emphasize different proof points across the run.

single_image editorial product stillcollab limited dropstrawberry paletteretro magazine

Visual summary

Editorial still of the collab pouch on a bed of strawberries with a retro red headline and a small limited edition tag.

Copy verbatim

HeadlineGreens daily greens x Olipop strawberry vanilla (limited edition)
Primary textLimited edition flavor collab on a bed of real strawberries.
CTAShop Now

Color palette

Typography

Retro italic serif headline in dual lines with a soft rounded wordmark.

Composition

Center anchored product on a flat bed of strawberries with headline above and a small green Limited edition tag.

Focal point

The product on the strawberry bed as the editorial centerpiece.

Mood

indulgent, premium collab, limited edition

Editorial limited drop product still. Conversion lever is FOMO plus elevated aesthetic.

HeadlineWe're so sorry
Primary textBrand letter format with an extended offer footer.
CTAShop Now

Slim serif headline and body, deliberately departing from the brand's usual bold sans for a brand-letter tone.

Composition

Headline top left, three paragraphs of body, mascot right anchored, offer band footer.

self deprecating, conversational, conversion driven

Card 2 headline: The math most protein shakes do not want you to see. Card 2 body: Premier 5.33. Quest 5.67. Fairlife Core Power 26g 6.54. Aonic Fuel 5.0, best in class. The lower the number, the more of each calorie is real protein. Card 2 headline: 92 percent of every Aonic Fuel can is protein and fiber. Card 2 body: 32g protein plus 5g fiber out of 160 total calories. Card 3 headline: 5.0 cal per gram, best in class. Card 3 body: Real cocoa. Lactose free MPI. Zero artificial sweeteners.
